title: T-084 — Compliance docs upload + signed URL + soft-delete Server Actions (NPD-i)
prompt:
# T-084 — Compliance docs lifecycle actions

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §19
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Actions backing compliance_docs CRUD: uploadDoc (multipart → tenant-isolated bucket + insert row), getSignedUrl (TTL ≤15 min, audited), softDeleteDoc, listDocs.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/docs/_actions/upload-doc.ts: RBAC compliance_doc.write; client+server validates MIME + size; uploads to tenant-bucket via Supabase storage adapter; INSERT compliance_docs row with version_number = max+1; emits 'compliance_doc.uploaded'.
2. apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/docs/_actions/get-signed-url.ts: returns signed URL TTL=15 min; writes audit_events row 'compliance_doc.url_granted'.
3. apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/docs/_actions/soft-delete-doc.ts: RBAC compliance_doc.write; sets deleted_at; emits 'compliance_doc.deleted'.
4. apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/docs/_actions/list-docs.ts: returns active docs (deleted_at IS NULL).

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/docs/_actions/upload-doc.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/docs/_actions/get-signed-url.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/docs/_actions/soft-delete-doc.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/docs/_actions/list-docs.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/docs/_actions/__tests__/docs-actions.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a user uploads a 25 MB PDF, when uploadDoc runs, then it rejects with FILE_TOO_LARGE before storage call and no compliance_docs row is inserted per §19 size limit
2. Given a user requests a signed URL, when getSignedUrl returns, then the URL TTL is ≤900 seconds and an audit_events row 'compliance_doc.url_granted' is written per §19 audit contract
3. Given two uploads for the same (product, doc_type) succeed, when listDocs is queried, then version_number=1 and version_number=2 both exist (overwrite forbidden) per §19 versioning contract

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/docs-actions.test.ts (size reject, signed URL TTL+audit, version increment) before actions exist (mock Supabase storage)
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test docs-actions'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow files outside MIME allowlist (server-side validation in addition to DB CHECK)
- Do not allow signed URL TTL >15 min
- Do not overwrite an existing version (must bump)

pipeline_inputs.description: uploadDoc + getSignedUrl + softDeleteDoc + listDocs Server Actions with MIME/size validation + 15 min TTL + audit emit.
pipeline_inputs.details: All actions RBAC-gated. Upload uses Supabase storage adapter with tenant-isolated bucket. Versioning auto-increments.

Given two uploads for the same (product, doc_type) succeed, when listDocs is queried, then version_number=1 and version_number=2 both exist (overwrite forbidden) per §19 versioning contract
